description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the course "Chemistry 101" (CHEM101), create a manual grade item named "Experiment 1 Total" using the calculation formula =[[PreLab1]] + ([[PostLab1]] * 2). Assign the ID numbers "PreLab1" and "PostLab1" to the existing grade items "Pre-Lab 1" and "Post-Lab 1" respectively to enable the calculation.
